metadata.name: discord_support_bot
metadata.description: Discord support workflow: classify, search, compose, and route

data.task: Classify the incoming support query into: FAQ, Bug Report, Feature Request, Account Issue, Billing, General Question. Extract key entities (product area, error messages, versions mentioned). Assess sentiment (positive/neutral/negative). Output structured classification.
Search the knowledge base for relevant FAQ entries, documentation, and past resolved tickets matching the classified intent. Return top 3 matches with relevance scores.

Based on the classification and knowledge base results: If FAQ match (confidence > 0.8): compose a direct answer citing the FAQ source. If Bug Report: draft a ticket JSON {title, description, severity, labels, reproduction_steps}. If no confident match: compose a polite acknowledgment and flag for human escalation with reason.
